title: 有馬記念の後に・燃料、満タンで

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! Absolutely incredible! Please give a
round of applause for the winner of this year's
Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Mayano Top Gun was incredible. To think
she'd actually beat Brian...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, seriously. But like...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the end for Brian or anything. You know
what I mean, right?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I agree... I think she'd win if they raced
again.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Pant... Wheeze... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
H-hey! Are you okay, Mayano? You look like
you're in pain...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness. You're her trainer, right? It
looks like she's pushed herself too far. She needs
to rest immediately...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It's okay... I'm fine. It's just...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That was so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's move on. If you have a question
you'd like to ask, please raise—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Pick me, pick me, pick me!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Okay. How about yo—Mayano Top Gun?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hi, Brian! What race are you gonna run in next?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wanna race you again!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Right up until the end of that race just now, I
didn't know what to do or what to expect... My
heart was pounding the whole time...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It was so, so, sooo exciting!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Mayano Top Gun... We actually want
to keep the questions limited to the press...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No! I'm almost done, so wait just a second!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, let's race together again! I'll show you I
can beat you one more time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Pretty please! Brian, don't tell me you're satisfied
with ending things here?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Get a hold of yourself! Miss Brian—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: The Hanshin Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: There's your answer. Next question.

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Uh... Okay then! Any another questions?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh... That was pretty fresh, Mayano.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Of course you'd fly directly into the flames. You
truly don't know fear. Either that, or—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Haha! She's got you hook, line, and sinker!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But that's a good thing. I'll have to remember the
two of you.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Traaaaainerrrrr!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Listen, listen! I wanna race in the Hanshin
Daishoten next!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh, how'd you know? Telepathy?! Or are we
soulmates?!
choice_data_list: I figured it out from how excited you were.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Of course you'd realize.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm definitely going to beat Brian at the
Hanshin Daishoten! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll face whatever turbulence head-on—because
that's the way I fly!
